fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — your co-pilot for the Four Wheeler. Here's what we can do together:

🤖 Motion & Poses
"Make the four wheeler drive forward in a straight line"
"Get it to do a wide turning circle to the left"
"Make it reverse slowly and then brake to a stop"

⚙️ Simulation & Physics
"Increase the wheel friction so it grips better on the surface"
"Make the chassis heavier and see how it affects handling"
"Add a bump on the ground to test suspension response"

🛠️ Customise & Extend
"Add a second four wheeler to the scene for a race"
"Give the vehicle a roof and make it look more like a car"
"Add headlights as glowing spheres at the front"

No task has been given. I won't write or modify files without one.

**What do you want to do with the Four Wheeler?** Tell me and I'll act on it immediately. 🚗
